title: Scripbox Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Scripbox Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox Holdings Services:
Scripbox Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox Holdings Services!
